data.title: Upbit Lists BERA, JTO, and SCR With Trading Restrictions
data.description:
The post Upbit Lists BERA, JTO, and SCR With Trading Restrictions appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Upbit is listing Berachain (BERA), Jito (JTO), and Scroll (SCR) on February 6, with deposits opening earlier. BERA trading starts at 22:00 KST on the Berachain network, supporting staking and transactions via a Proof of Liquidity model. JTO (Solana) and SCR (Scroll) trading begins at...
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/upbit-lists-bera-jto-and-scr-with-trading-restrictions/

data.title: Kraken’s Powell claims in lawsuit he was denied housing due to crypto ties
data.description:
Kraken co-founder Jesse Powell filed a housing discrimination suit, alleging a San Francisco building’s management blocked a sale due to his involvement with crypto.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-jesse-powell-denied-house-crypto-ties-discrimination-lawsuit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OKX Web3 Consensus Night will be held in Hong Kong on February 18th, and registration is now open
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, "OKX Web3 Consensus Night" will be held in Hong Kong on February 18, 2025. At that time, the top KOLs, industry experts and active communities in the Chinese Web3 field will gather together to discuss technological innovation, ecological development and future trends.
It is reported that the agenda of this event covers keynote speeches, industry roundtable discussions and high-energy parties, aiming to promote technical exchanges, strengthen cooperative connections, create an industry feast dedicated to Web3, and promote the development of global crypto ecological consensus. The registration channel is now open.
Click "Original Link" to learn more.

data.title: Arbitrum Integrates with BitcoinOS to Scale to the Bitcoin Network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Arbitrum has integrated with BitcoinOS (BOS) to bring its L2 scaling solution to the Bitcoin network. This integration enables Arbitrum One to act as a hybrid rollup, leveraging the security of Bitcoin and the scalability of Ethereum. By using BitcoinOS (BOS), the network obtains trustless cross-chain and Bitcoin finality guarantees through the BOS Grail bridge.
The development team believes that this reduces counterparty risk compared to existing Bitcoin interoperability solutions. The BOS framework uses zero-knowledge proofs (ZK) to enable Bitcoin transactions to interact with other ecosystems. It is expected that this integration will provide Bitcoin holders with wider access to DeFi applications and smart contracts.

data.title: Gate.io Launchpool ANLOG mining has nearly 30,000 users participating, and GT market value has soared to 47th in the world
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Analog (ANLOG) spot trading at 19:00 (UTC+8) on February 10, 2025. At the same time, the first mining project of Gate.io Launchpool ANLOG was launched at 19:00 (UTC+8) on February 5 for a period of 5 days. Users can stake GT and USDT to share more than 21 million ANLOG airdrop rewards every hour, of which the USDT novice pool is estimated to be as high as 310.09% annualized. 
So far, the first phase of Launchpool ANLOG mining project has attracted nearly 30,000 users to participate, of which the total USDT staked is nearly 50 million, and the GT staked has exceeded 2.9 million. It is reported that the market value of Gate.io platform currency GT continues to rise, and now ranks 47th in the cryptocurrency market value list, a record high. In addition, the second phase of ANLOG mining project will be launched simultaneously with spot trading, supporting users to pledge ANLOG and BTC to earn airdrops, with an estimated annualized return of up to 1216.67%.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF continued to have net inflows for 5 consecutive days, with a cumulative net inflow of US$3.168 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 5, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 18.1052 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 7.1648 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.926 billion US dollars. Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net inflow of 5.2076 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of 20.0624 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of FETH has reached 1.51 billion US dollars. The second is Grayscale ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$5.2076 million. Currently, the total net inflow of ETH has reached US$612 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$10.486 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.15%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.168 billion.

data.title: Majority Of Institutional Traders Avoid Crypto In 2025, JPMorgan Survey Reveals
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, a recent JPMorgan survey indicates that over 70% of institutional traders have no plans to engage in cryptocurrency trading this year. The survey, conducted in January, highlights a slight decrease in disinterest from 78% in 2024 to 71% in 2025. Despite this, 16% of respondents expressed intentions to trade crypto, and 13% reported they are already involved, marking an increase from the previous year.

Interestingly, all participants in the annual trading poll expressed intentions to boost online or e-trading activities, particularly for less liquid assets. This trend emerges amid an evolving regulatory landscape for digital assets in the United States, following significant changes in financial agencies under U.S. President Donald Trump's administration. Eddie Wen, JPMorgan’s global head of digital markets, noted that recent developments have reduced barriers for traditional banking entities to enter the crypto space.

The survey also revealed that inflation and tariffs are expected to have the most significant impact on markets in 2025, with geopolitical tensions following closely. Market volatility was identified as the primary trading challenge by 41% of respondents, up from 28% last year. Gergana Thiel, global co-head of Macro Sales at JPMorgan, commented on the survey results, noting the anticipated focus on tariffs and inflation as central market risks.

The survey involved 4,200 JPMorgan clients from 60 global locations, conducted between January 9 and 23. Signals of U.S. government support for the crypto industry have been bolstered by the SEC's recent decision to scale back its crypto enforcement unit. Additionally, President Trump signed an executive order to establish a sovereign wealth fund, to be managed in part by pro-crypto officials Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick. Senator Cynthia Lummis suggested the fund might be used to purchase Bitcoin.

In related developments, White House “crypto czar” David Sacks announced plans to bring stablecoins onshore, aiming to enhance the dollar’s international dominance and digital presence. These moves reflect a broader governmental shift towards embracing the crypto industry, potentially influencing future market dynamics.

data.title: JupiterDAO Regains Control Of Jupiter X Account
data.description: According to Foresight News, JupiterDAO announced via Twitter that it has regained control of the Jupiter X account. However, the organization noted that it will take additional time to thoroughly review all security measures.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Still believes BTC will retest $70,000-75,000, and needs to "demystify" the strategic reserve of Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Arthur Hayes published an article today discussing the main wishes of many people in the global crypto industry regarding the establishment of a Bitcoin Strategic Reserve (BSR) and crypto regulation under the United States. He said: "Broadly speaking, many misguided crypto people want the US government to print money and buy Bitcoin as part of the national reserve and establish regulatory moats for crypto businesses in which it has an economic interest. I think these people are asking for the wrong thing.
The fundamental problem with the government hoarding any asset is that they buy and sell assets primarily for political interests, not financial interests. Given the current structure of the global economic system, does Bitcoin itself have any role to play for the US government? No. Bitcoin is just another financial asset. For Trump, the motivation is to appease the voter base that helped him get into office.
Suppose Trump is able to create the BSR. The government buys one million Bitcoins as suggested by US Senator Lummis. Then the price will go crazy. Then the purchase ends and the upward trend channel closes. Creating a BSR or a national reserve of junk coins (including XRP) will turn any cryptocurrency held by the government into a powerful political weapon. In addition, as a purely political strategy, will the US government meaningfully participate in community activities? Will they donate to sponsor Bitcoin core developers? Will they run nodes? Maybe... But from the way people talk about the BSR, it seems to me that this is a set-and-forget activity." Overall, the policy will change with changes in the political situation, thus affecting the original trend of Bitcoin.
Arthur Hayes is equally pessimistic about the upcoming crypto bill: "Those building truly decentralized technologies and applications do not have the financial resources to play politics at this critical juncture in the cycle. The desire for cryptocurrency regulation may come true, and if it does, it will come in an overly complex, prescriptive form that only large, wealthy centralized companies can afford.
Industry giants are trying to maximize shareholder value by creating a monopoly structure that is uniquely beneficial to their business. I believe this regulation will not change the status quo. Although it has no direct negative impact on the crypto industry, it is not positive either.
For all the global entrepreneurs who have moved to the United States because the US government is friendly to cryptocurrencies, please note. If you acquiesce to such an outcome, your startup is doomed to fail."
In the end, Hayes still believes that "Bitcoin will retest $70,000 to $75,000. Only if the Federal Reserve, the US Treasury, China, Japan, etc. print money in some form, or enact specific legislation that allows for permissionless cryptocurrency innovation. The cryptocurrency bill will benefit Coinbase, BlackRock, and stonk investors. But for those of us who are crypto degen “For the most part, this is not going to push the market to new heights. It’s not going to further the goal of decentralizing everything.”

data.title: Jupiter has regained control of account X and is conducting a security review
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, JupiterDAO announced that the Jupiter X account has been protected and Jupiter has regained control of the X account, but it still takes some time to review all security measures.
